Variables.Name: Sounds
Variables.Description: Array of sounds to play at specific times.

Variables.Name: bPlayOnReverse
Variables.Description: if set, sound plays only when playing the matinee in reverse instead of when the matinee plays forward

Variables.Name: bContinueSoundOnMatineeEnd
Variables.Description: If true, sounds on this track will not be forced to finish when the matinee sequence finishes.

Variables.Name: bSuppressSubtitles
Variables.Description: If true, don't show subtitles for sounds played by this track.

Variables.Name: bTreatAsDialogue
Variables.Description: If true and track is controlling a pawn, makes the pawn "speak" the given audio.
